authors_text: Yuwei Li,Longwen Zhang,Zesong Qiu,Yingwenqi Jiang,Nianyi Li,Yuexin Ma,Yuyao Zhang,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu
title: NIMBLE: A Non-rigid Hand Model with Bones and Muscles
title_zh: NIMBLE：具有骨骼和肌肉的非刚性手部模型
abstract: Emerging Metaverse applications demand reliable, accurate, and photorealistic reproductions of human hands to perform sophisticated operations as if in the physical world. While real human hand represents one of the most intricate coordination between bones, muscle, tendon, and skin, state-of-the-art techniques unanimously focus on modeling only the skeleton of the hand. In this paper, we present NIMBLE, a novel parametric hand model that includes the missing key components, bringing 3D hand model to a new level of realism. We first annotate muscles, bones and skins on the recent Magnetic Resonance Imaging hand (MRI-Hand) dataset and then register a volumetric template hand onto individual poses and subjects within the dataset. NIMBLE consists of 20 bones as triangular meshes, 7 muscle groups as tetrahedral meshes, and a skin mesh. Via iterative shape registration and parameter learning, it further produces shape blend shapes, pose blend shapes, and a joint regressor. We demonstrate applying NIMBLE to modeling, rendering, and visual inference tasks. By enforcing the inner bones and muscles to match anatomic and kinematic rules, NIMBLE can animate 3D hands to new poses at unprecedented realism. To model the appearance of skin, we further construct a photometric HandStage to acquire high-quality textures and normal maps to model wrinkles and palm print. Finally, NIMBLE also benefits learning-based hand pose and shape estimation by either synthesizing rich data or acting directly as a differentiable layer in the inference network.

While real human hand represents one of the most intricate coordination between bones, muscle, tendon, and skin, state-of-the-art techniques unanimously focus on modeling only the skeleton of the hand. In this paper, we present NIMBLE, a novel parametric hand model that includes the missing key components, bringing 3D hand model to a new level of realism. We first annotate muscles, bones and skins on the recent Magnetic Resonance Imaging hand (MRI-Hand) dataset and then register a volumetric template hand onto individual poses and subjects within the dataset. NIMBLE consists of 20 bones as triangular meshes, 7 muscle groups as tetrahedral meshes, and a skin mesh. Via iterative shape registration and parameter learning, it further produces shape blend shapes, pose blend shapes, and a joint regressor. We demonstrate applying NIMBLE to modeling, rendering, and visual inference tasks. By enforcing the inner bones and muscles to match anatomic and kinematic rules, NIMBLE can animate 3D hands to new poses at unprecedented realism. To model the appearance of skin, we further construct a photometric HandStage to acquire high-quality textures and normal maps to model wrinkles and palm print. Finally, NIMBLE also benefits learning-based hand pose and shape estimation by either synthesizing rich data or acting directly as a differentiable layer in the inference network.
abstract_zh: 新兴的 Metaverse 应用程序需要可靠、准确且逼真的人手复制品，以像在物理世界中一样执行复杂的操作。虽然真正的人手代表了骨骼、肌肉、肌腱和皮肤之间最复杂的协调之一，但最先进的技术一致集中于仅对手部骨骼进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了 NIMBLE，一种新颖的参数化手部模型，其中包含缺失的关键组件，将 3D 手部模型的真实感提升到了一个新的水平。我们首先在最近的磁共振成像手（MRI-Hand）数据集上注释肌肉、骨骼和皮肤，然后将体积模板手注册到数据集中的各个姿势和主体上。 NIMBLE 由 20 个三角形网格骨骼、7 个四面体网格肌肉群和一个皮肤网格组成。通过迭代形状注册和参数学习，它进一步生成形状混合形状、姿势混合形状和联合回归器。我们演示了将 NIMBLE 应用于建模、渲染和视觉推理任务。通过强制内部骨骼和肌肉符合解剖学和运动学规则，NIMBLE 可以以前所未有的真实感将 3D 手动画制作成新姿势。为了模拟皮肤的外观，我们进一步构建了一个光度测量 HandStage 来获取高质量的纹理和法线贴图来模拟皱纹和掌纹。最后，NIMBLE 还通过合成丰富的数据或直接充当推理网络中的可微层，使基于学习的手势和形状估计受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NIMBLE，一种包含骨骼和肌肉的非刚性3D手部模型，提升手部动画和渲染的真实感。
AI.motivation: 现有手部模型仅关注骨骼结构，缺乏肌肉和皮肤的精细建模，难以满足元宇宙等场景对高真实感手部动画的需求。
AI.method: 基于MRI数据注释骨骼、肌肉和皮肤，通过体积模板注册生成网格模型，并结合迭代形状注册与参数学习构建混合形状及关节回归器，同时使用HandStage获取皮肤纹理与法线图。
AI.result: 实现高真实感手部动画与渲染，支持复杂姿势生成，并提升基于学习的手部姿态和形状估计性能。
AI.conclusion: NIMBLE通过整合骨骼肌肉系统与皮肤细节，为3D手部建模提供了更符合解剖学规律的解决方案，推动元宇宙等应用发展。

authors_text: Leandro Aparecido Passos,João Paulo Papa,Javier Del Ser,Amir Hussain,Ahsan Adeel
title: Multimodal Audio-Visual Information Fusion using Canonical-Correlated Graph Neural Network for Energy-Efficient Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 使用规范相关图神经网络进行多模态视听信息融合，实现节能语音增强
abstract: This paper proposes a novel multimodal self-supervised architecture for energy-efficient audio-visual (AV) speech enhancement that integrates Graph Neural Networks with canonical correlation analysis (CCA-GNN). The proposed approach lays its foundations on a state-of-the-art CCA-GNN that learns representative embeddings by maximizing the correlation between pairs of augmented views of the same input while decorrelating disconnected features. The key idea of the conventional CCA-GNN involves discarding augmentation-variant information and preserving augmentation-invariant information while preventing capturing of redundant information. Our proposed AV CCA-GNN model deals with multimodal representation learning context. Specifically, our model improves contextual AV speech processing by maximizing canonical correlation from augmented views of the same channel and canonical correlation from audio and visual embeddings. In addition, it proposes a positional node encoding that considers a prior-frame sequence distance instead of a feature-space representation when computing the node's nearest neighbors, introducing temporal information in the embeddings through the neighborhood's connectivity. Experiments conducted on the benchmark ChiME3 dataset show that our proposed prior frame-based AV CCA-GNN ensures better feature learning in the temporal context, leading to more energy-efficient speech reconstruction than state-of-the-art CCA-GNN and multilayer perceptron.
summary: This paper proposes a novel multimodal self-supervised architecture for energy-efficient audio-visual (AV) speech enhancement that integrates Graph Neural Networks with canonical correlation analysis (CCA-GNN). The proposed approach lays its foundations on a state-of-the-art CCA-GNN that learns representative embeddings by maximizing the correlation between pairs of augmented views of the same input while decorrelating disconnected features. The key idea of the conventional CCA-GNN involves discarding augmentation-variant information and preserving augmentation-invariant information while preventing capturing of redundant information. Our proposed AV CCA-GNN model deals with multimodal representation learning context. Specifically, our model improves contextual AV speech processing by maximizing canonical correlation from augmented views of the same channel and canonical correlation from audio and visual embeddings. In addition, it proposes a positional node encoding that considers a prior-frame sequence distance instead of a feature-space representation when computing the node's nearest neighbors, introducing temporal information in the embeddings through the neighborhood's connectivity. Experiments conducted on the benchmark ChiME3 dataset show that our proposed prior frame-based AV CCA-GNN ensures better feature learning in the temporal context, leading to more energy-efficient speech reconstruction than state-of-the-art CCA-GNN and multilayer perceptron.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的多模态自监督架构，用于节能视听（AV）语音增强，它将图神经网络与典型相关分析（CCA-GNN）相结合。所提出的方法奠定了最先进的 CCA-GNN 的基础，该 CCA-GNN 通过最大化同一输入的增强视图对之间的相关性同时去相关断开的特征来学习代表性嵌入。传统 CCA-GNN 的关键思想包括丢弃增强变量信息并保留增强不变信息，同时防止捕获冗余信息。我们提出的 AV CCA-GNN 模型处理多模态表示学习上下文。具体来说，我们的模型通过最大化同一通道的增强视图的规范相关性以及音频和视觉嵌入的规范相关性来改进上下文 AV 语音处理。此外，它提出了一种位置节点编码，在计算节点的最近邻居时考虑先验帧序列距离而不是特征空间表示，通过邻域的连通性在嵌入中引入时间信息。在基准 ChiME3 数据集上进行的实验表明，我们提出的基于先验帧的 AV CCA-GNN 确保了时间上下文中更好的特征学习，从而比最先进的 CCA-GNN 和多层感知器实现更节能的语音重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合规范相关分析与图神经网络的多模态自监督架构，用于实现节能的视听语音增强。
AI.motivation: 现有语音增强方法在多模态信息融合与能效优化方面存在不足，需探索更高效的特征学习与表示方法。
AI.method: 设计CCA-GNN框架，通过最大化增强视图间的规范相关性并引入先验帧序列距离的位置编码，结合音频与视觉嵌入的跨模态关联。
AI.result: 在ChiME3数据集实验中，该模型在时序特征学习与语音重建能效上优于传统CCA-GNN及多层感知机。
AI.conclusion: 提出的先验帧编码机制有效提升了多模态特征学习的时序感知能力，实现了更优的节能语音增强效果。

authors_text: Moyi Yang,Junjie Sheng,Xiangfeng Wang,Wenyan Liu,Bo Jin,Jun Wang,Hongyuan Zha
title: Obtaining Dyadic Fairness by Optimal Transport
title_zh: 通过最优传输获得二元公平
abstract: Fairness has been taken as a critical metric in machine learning models, which is considered as an important component of trustworthy machine learning. In this paper, we focus on obtaining fairness for popular link prediction tasks, which are measured by dyadic fairness. A novel pre-processing methodology is proposed to establish dyadic fairness through data repairing based on optimal transport theory. With the well-established theoretical connection between the dyadic fairness for graph link prediction and a conditional distribution alignment problem, the dyadic repairing scheme can be equivalently transformed into a conditional distribution alignment problem. Furthermore, an optimal transport-based dyadic fairness algorithm called DyadicOT is obtained by efficiently solving the alignment problem, satisfying flexibility and unambiguity requirements. The proposed DyadicOT algorithm shows superior results in obtaining fairness compared to other fairness methods on two benchmark graph datasets.
summary: Fairness has been taken as a critical metric in machine learning models, which is considered as an important component of trustworthy machine learning. In this paper, we focus on obtaining fairness for popular link prediction tasks, which are measured by dyadic fairness. A novel pre-processing methodology is proposed to establish dyadic fairness through data repairing based on optimal transport theory. With the well-established theoretical connection between the dyadic fairness for graph link prediction and a conditional distribution alignment problem, the dyadic repairing scheme can be equivalently transformed into a conditional distribution alignment problem. Furthermore, an optimal transport-based dyadic fairness algorithm called DyadicOT is obtained by efficiently solving the alignment problem, satisfying flexibility and unambiguity requirements. The proposed DyadicOT algorithm shows superior results in obtaining fairness compared to other fairness methods on two benchmark graph datasets.
abstract_zh: 公平性已被视为机器学习模型的关键指标，被认为是值得信赖的机器学习的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们专注于获得流行链接预测任务的公平性，这是通过二元公平性来衡量的。提出了一种新颖的预处理方法，通过基于最优传输理论的数据修复来建立二元公平性。利用图链接预测的二元公平性和条件分布对齐问题之间良好的理论联系，二元修复方案可以等效地转化为条件分布对齐问题。此外，通过有效解决对齐问题，获得了一种称为DyadicOT的基于传输的最优二元公平算法，满足灵活性和明确性要求。在两个基准图数据集上，与其他公平方法相比，所提出的 DyadicOT 算法在获得公平性方面显示出优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最优运输理论的数据修复方法，用于在图链接预测任务中实现二元公平性。
AI.motivation: 公平性是可信机器学习的重要组成部分，而现有方法在处理图链接预测中的二元公平性时存在灵活性和明确性不足的问题。
AI.method: 将二元公平性问题转化为条件分布对齐问题，通过最优运输理论构建数据修复方案，提出名为DyadicOT的算法。
AI.result: 在两个基准图数据集上，DyadicOT算法相比其他公平性方法表现出更优的公平性提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 基于最优运输的DyadicOT算法能有效解决图链接预测中的二元公平性问题，满足灵活性和明确性要求。

search_text: Obtaining Dyadic Fairness by Optimal Transport 通过最优传输获得二元公平 Fairness has been taken as a critical metric in machine learning models, which is considered as an important component of trustworthy machine learning. In this paper, we focus on obtaining fairness for popular link prediction tasks, which are measured by dyadic fairness. A novel pre-processing methodology is proposed to establish dyadic fairness through data repairing based on optimal transport theory. With the well-established theoretical connection between the dyadic fairness for graph link prediction and a conditional distribution alignment problem, the dyadic repairing scheme can be equivalently transformed into a conditional distribution alignment problem. Furthermore, an optimal transport-based dyadic fairness algorithm called DyadicOT is obtained by efficiently solving the alignment problem, satisfying flexibility and unambiguity requirements. The proposed DyadicOT algorithm shows superior results in obtaining fairness compared to other fairness methods on two benchmark graph datasets. 公平性已被视为机器学习模型的关键指标，被认为是值得信赖的机器学习的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们专注于获得流行链接预测任务的公平性，这是通过二元公平性来衡量的。提出了一种新颖的预处理方法，通过基于最优传输理论的数据修复来建立二元公平性。利用图链接预测的二元公平性和条件分布对齐问题之间良好的理论联系，二元修复方案可以等效地转化为条件分布对齐问题。此外，通过有效解决对齐问题，获得了一种称为DyadicOT的基于传输的最优二元公平算法，满足灵活性和明确性要求。在两个基准图数据集上，与其他公平方法相比，所提出的 DyadicOT 算法在获得公平性方面显示出优异的结果。 本文提出一种基于最优运输理论的数据修复方法，用于在图链接预测任务中实现二元公平性。 Moyi Yang,Junjie Sheng,Xiangfeng Wang,Wenyan Liu,Bo Jin,Jun Wang,Hongyuan Zha cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zohaib Amjad Khan,Azeddine Beghdadi,Mounir Kaaniche,Faouzi Alaya Cheikh,Osama Gharbi
title: A Neural Network based Framework for Effective Laparoscopic Video Quality Assessment
title_zh: 基于神经网络的有效腹腔镜视频质量评估框架
abstract: Video quality assessment is a challenging problem having a critical significance in the context of medical imaging. For instance, in laparoscopic surgery, the acquired video data suffers from different kinds of distortion that not only hinder surgery performance but also affect the execution of subsequent tasks in surgical navigation and robotic surgeries. For this reason, we propose in this paper neural network-based approaches for distortion classification as well as quality prediction. More precisely, a Residual Network (ResNet) based approach is firstly developed for simultaneous ranking and classification task. Then, this architecture is extended to make it appropriate for the quality prediction task by using an additional Fully Connected Neural Network (FCNN). To train the overall architecture (ResNet and FCNN models), transfer learning and end-to-end learning approaches are investigated. Experimental results, carried out on a new laparoscopic video quality database, have shown the efficiency of the proposed methods compared to recent conventional and deep learning based approaches.
summary: Video quality assessment is a challenging problem having a critical significance in the context of medical imaging. For instance, in laparoscopic surgery, the acquired video data suffers from different kinds of distortion that not only hinder surgery performance but also affect the execution of subsequent tasks in surgical navigation and robotic surgeries. For this reason, we propose in this paper neural network-based approaches for distortion classification as well as quality prediction. More precisely, a Residual Network (ResNet) based approach is firstly developed for simultaneous ranking and classification task. Then, this architecture is extended to make it appropriate for the quality prediction task by using an additional Fully Connected Neural Network (FCNN). To train the overall architecture (ResNet and FCNN models), transfer learning and end-to-end learning approaches are investigated. Experimental results, carried out on a new laparoscopic video quality database, have shown the efficiency of the proposed methods compared to recent conventional and deep learning based approaches.
abstract_zh: 视频质量评估是一个具有挑战性的问题，在医学成像领域具有至关重要的意义。例如，在腹腔镜手术中，获取的视频数据会遭受不同类型的失真，这不仅会影响手术效果，还会影响手术导航和机器人手术中后续任务的执行。因此，我们在本文中提出了基于神经网络的失真分类和质量预测方法。更准确地说，首先开发了一种基于残差网络（ResNet）的方法，用于同时进行排序和分类任务。然后，通过使用额外的全连接神经网络（FCNN）对该架构进行扩展，使其适合质量预测任务。为了训练整体架构（ResNet 和 FCNN 模型），研究了迁移学习和端到端学习方法。在新的腹腔镜视频质量数据库上进行的实验结果表明，与最近的传统方法和基于深度学习的方法相比，所提出的方法更加高效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于神经网络的腹腔镜视频质量评估框架，用于失真分类与质量预测。
AI.motivation: 腹腔镜手术视频因失真影响手术效果及后续导航任务，需有效质量评估方法。
AI.method: 构建ResNet模型实现失真分类与排序，扩展FCNN进行质量预测，结合迁移学习与端到端训练。
AI.result: 在新型腹腔镜视频数据库实验中，所提方法优于传统及现有深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的神经网络框架有效提升腹腔镜视频质量评估性能，为医疗图像处理提供新思路。

authors_text: David P. Woodruff,Amir Zandieh
title: Leverage Score Sampling for Tensor Product Matrices in Input Sparsity Time
title_zh: 输入稀疏时间内张量积矩阵的杠杆分数采样
abstract: We propose an input sparsity time sampling algorithm that can spectrally approximate the Gram matrix corresponding to the $q$-fold column-wise tensor product of $q$ matrices using a nearly optimal number of samples, improving upon all previously known methods by poly$(q)$ factors. Furthermore, for the important special case of the $q$-fold self-tensoring of a dataset, which is the feature matrix of the degree-$q$ polynomial kernel, the leading term of our method's runtime is proportional to the size of the input dataset and has no dependence on $q$. Previous techniques either incur poly$(q)$ slowdowns in their runtime or remove the dependence on $q$ at the expense of having sub-optimal target dimension, and depend quadratically on the number of data-points in their runtime. Our sampling technique relies on a collection of $q$ partially correlated random projections which can be simultaneously applied to a dataset $X$ in total time that only depends on the size of $X$, and at the same time their $q$-fold Kronecker product acts as a near-isometry for any fixed vector in the column span of $X^{\otimes q}$. We also show that our sampling methods generalize to other classes of kernels beyond polynomial, such as Gaussian and Neural Tangent kernels.
summary: We propose an input sparsity time sampling algorithm that can spectrally approximate the Gram matrix corresponding to the $q$-fold column-wise tensor product of $q$ matrices using a nearly optimal number of samples, improving upon all previously known methods by poly$(q)$ factors. Furthermore, for the important special case of the $q$-fold self-tensoring of a dataset, which is the feature matrix of the degree-$q$ polynomial kernel, the leading term of our method's runtime is proportional to the size of the input dataset and has no dependence on $q$. Previous techniques either incur poly$(q)$ slowdowns in their runtime or remove the dependence on $q$ at the expense of having sub-optimal target dimension, and depend quadratically on the number of data-points in their runtime. Our sampling technique relies on a collection of $q$ partially correlated random projections which can be simultaneously applied to a dataset $X$ in total time that only depends on the size of $X$, and at the same time their $q$-fold Kronecker product acts as a near-isometry for any fixed vector in the column span of $X^{\otimes q}$. We also show that our sampling methods generalize to other classes of kernels beyond polynomial, such as Gaussian and Neural Tangent kernels.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种输入稀疏时间采样算法，该算法可以使用接近最佳数量的样本对与 $q$ 矩阵的 $q$ 倍列张量积相对应的 Gram 矩阵进行光谱近似，通过 poly$(q)$ 因子改进所有先前已知的方法。此外，对于数据集的 $q$ 倍自张量的重要特殊情况，即次数 $q$ 多项式核的特征矩阵，我们方法的运行时间的首项与输入数据集的大小成正比，并且不依赖于 $q$。以前的技术要么在运行时导致 poly$(q)$ 减速，要么以次优目标维度为代价消除对 $q$ 的依赖，并且二次依赖于运行时数据点的数量。我们的采样技术依赖于部分相关的 $q$ 随机投影的集合，这些投影可以在总时间内同时应用于数据集 $X$，该数据集仅取决于 $X$ 的大小，同时它们的 $q$ 倍 Kronecker 乘积充当 $X^{\otimes q}$ 列跨度中任何固定向量的近等距。我们还表明，我们的采样方法可以推广到多项式之外的其他类别的内核，例如高斯和神经正切内核。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种输入稀疏时间抽样算法，用于近似张量积矩阵的Gram矩阵，改进了现有方法的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高阶张量积矩阵时存在多项式因子的运行时间开销或目标维度次优的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过一组部分相关的随机投影同时作用于数据集，其q重Kronecker积在列空间内近似等距，时间复杂度仅依赖输入规模。
AI.result: 算法运行时间与输入数据集大小成比例且独立于q，适用于多项式、高斯及神经切线核等场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持近似精度的同时显著提升计算效率，扩展了核方法的应用范围。

Previous techniques either incur poly$(q)$ slowdowns in their runtime or remove the dependence on $q$ at the expense of having sub-optimal target dimension, and depend quadratically on the number of data-points in their runtime. We also show that our sampling methods generalize to other classes of kernels beyond polynomial, such as Gaussian and Neural Tangent kernels. 我们提出了一种输入稀疏时间采样算法，该算法可以使用接近最佳数量的样本对与 $q$ 矩阵的 $q$ 倍列张量积相对应的 Gram 矩阵进行光谱近似，通过 poly$(q)$ 因子改进所有先前已知的方法。此外，对于数据集的 $q$ 倍自张量的重要特殊情况，即次数 $q$ 多项式核的特征矩阵，我们方法的运行时间的首项与输入数据集的大小成正比，并且不依赖于 $q$。以前的技术要么在运行时导致 poly$(q)$ 减速，要么以次优目标维度为代价消除对 $q$ 的依赖，并且二次依赖于运行时数据点的数量。我们的采样技术依赖于部分相关的 $q$ 随机投影的集合，这些投影可以在总时间内同时应用于数据集 $X$，该数据集仅取决于 $X$ 的大小，同时它们的 $q$ 倍 Kronecker 乘积充当 $X^{\otimes q}$ 列跨度中任何固定向量的近等距。我们还表明，我们的采样方法可以推广到多项式之外的其他类别的内核，例如高斯和神经正切内核。 本文提出一种输入稀疏时间抽样算法，用于近似张量积矩阵的Gram矩阵，改进了现有方法的效率。 David P. Woodruff,Amir Zandieh cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Ryan Moodie
title: Optimising hadronic collider simulations using amplitude neural networks
title_zh: 使用振幅神经网络优化强子对撞机模拟
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, Proceedings of the 20th International Workshop on Advanced Computing and Analysis Techniques in Physics Research (ACAT 2021)
comments: 6 pages, 6 figures, Proceedings of the 20th International Workshop on Advanced Computing and Analysis Techniques in Physics Research (ACAT 2021)
abstract: Precision phenomenological studies of high-multiplicity scattering processes at collider experiments present a substantial theoretical challenge and are vitally important ingredients in experimental measurements. Machine learning technology has the potential to dramatically optimise simulations for complicated final states. We investigate the use of neural networks to approximate matrix elements, studying the case of loop-induced diphoton production through gluon fusion. We train neural network models on one-loop amplitudes from the NJet C++ library and interface them with the Sherpa Monte Carlo event generator to provide the matrix element within a realistic hadronic collider simulation. Computing some standard observables with the models and comparing to conventional techniques, we find excellent agreement in the distributions and a reduced total simulation time by a factor of thirty.
summary: Precision phenomenological studies of high-multiplicity scattering processes at collider experiments present a substantial theoretical challenge and are vitally important ingredients in experimental measurements. Machine learning technology has the potential to dramatically optimise simulations for complicated final states. We investigate the use of neural networks to approximate matrix elements, studying the case of loop-induced diphoton production through gluon fusion. We train neural network models on one-loop amplitudes from the NJet C++ library and interface them with the Sherpa Monte Carlo event generator to provide the matrix element within a realistic hadronic collider simulation. Computing some standard observables with the models and comparing to conventional techniques, we find excellent agreement in the distributions and a reduced total simulation time by a factor of thirty.
abstract_zh: 对撞机实验中高多重性散射过程的精确唯象研究提出了重大的理论挑战，并且是实验测量中至关重要的组成部分。机器学习技术有潜力显着优化复杂最终状态的模拟。我们研究使用神经网络来近似矩阵元素，研究通过胶子融合产生环路诱导双光子的情况。我们使用 NJet C++ 库中的单环振幅训练神经网络模型，并将它们与 Sherpa Monte Carlo 事件生成器连接，以在真实的强子对撞机模拟中提供矩阵元素。使用模型计算一些标准可观测值并与传统技术进行比较，我们发现分布非常一致，并且总模拟时间减少了三十倍。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究利用神经网络近似矩阵元以优化强子对撞机模拟，具体应用于环诱导双光子产生过程。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理高多重散射过程时计算量大且耗时，而机器学习技术有望显著提升复杂末态模拟的效率。
AI.method: 基于NJet库的一圈振幅数据训练神经网络模型，并将其集成至Sherpa事件生成器中进行模拟验证。
AI.result: 神经网络模型在观测分布上与传统方法高度一致，且总模拟时间缩短了30倍。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络有效替代传统矩阵元计算，为高精度 collider 模拟提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Krystal Maughan,Ivoline C. Ngong,Joseph P. Near
title: Prediction Sensitivity: Continual Audit of Counterfactual Fairness in Deployed Classifiers
title_zh: 预测灵敏度：对已部署分类器中的反事实公平性进行持续审核
abstract: As AI-based systems increasingly impact many areas of our lives, auditing these systems for fairness is an increasingly high-stakes problem. Traditional group fairness metrics can miss discrimination against individuals and are difficult to apply after deployment. Counterfactual fairness describes an individualized notion of fairness but is even more challenging to evaluate after deployment. We present prediction sensitivity, an approach for continual audit of counterfactual fairness in deployed classifiers. Prediction sensitivity helps answer the question: would this prediction have been different, if this individual had belonged to a different demographic group -- for every prediction made by the deployed model. Prediction sensitivity can leverage correlations between protected status and other features and does not require protected status information at prediction time. Our empirical results demonstrate that prediction sensitivity is effective for detecting violations of counterfactual fairness.
summary: As AI-based systems increasingly impact many areas of our lives, auditing these systems for fairness is an increasingly high-stakes problem. Traditional group fairness metrics can miss discrimination against individuals and are difficult to apply after deployment. Counterfactual fairness describes an individualized notion of fairness but is even more challenging to evaluate after deployment. We present prediction sensitivity, an approach for continual audit of counterfactual fairness in deployed classifiers. Prediction sensitivity helps answer the question: would this prediction have been different, if this individual had belonged to a different demographic group -- for every prediction made by the deployed model. Prediction sensitivity can leverage correlations between protected status and other features and does not require protected status information at prediction time. Our empirical results demonstrate that prediction sensitivity is effective for detecting violations of counterfactual fairness.
abstract_zh: 随着基于人工智能的系统日益影响我们生活的许多领域，审核这些系统的公平性成为一个越来越高风险的问题。传统的群体公平指标可能会忽略对个人的歧视，并且在部署后很难应用。反事实公平描述了一种个性化的公平概念，但在部署后评估起来更具挑战性。我们提出了预测敏感性，这是一种对已部署的分类器中的反事实公平性进行持续审核的方法。预测敏感性有助于回答以下问题：对于部署模型所做的每个预测，如果此人属于不同的人口统计群体，则此预测是否会有所不同。预测敏感性可以利用受保护状态和其他特征之间的相关性，并且在预测时不需要受保护状态信息。我们的实证结果表明，预测敏感性对于检测违反反事实公平性的行为是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为预测敏感度的方法，用于持续审计部署后分类器的反事实公平性。
AI.motivation: 传统公平性指标难以检测个体歧视且部署后难以应用，需一种新的方法持续审计反事实公平性。
AI.method: 通过分析受保护属性与其他特征的相关性，无需预测时的受保护信息，判断预测是否会因群体不同而改变。
AI.result: 实验表明预测敏感度能有效检测反事实公平性的违规情况。
AI.conclusion: 预测敏感度为部署后的公平性审计提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Man Zhu,Changshi Xiao,Shangding Gu,Zhe Du,Yuanqiao Wen
title: A Circle Grid-based Approach for Obstacle Avoidance Motion Planning of Unmanned Surface Vehicles
title_zh: 基于圆网格的无人地面车辆避障运动规划方法
abstract: Aiming at an obstacle avoidance problem with dynamic constraints for Unmanned Surface Vehicle (USV), a method based on Circle Grid Trajectory Cell (CGTC) is proposed. Firstly, the ship model and standardization rules are constructed to develop and constrain the trajectory, respectively. Secondly, by analyzing the properties of the circle grid, the circle grid tree is produced to guide the motion of the USV. Then, the kinematics and dynamics of the USV are considered through the on-line trajectory generator by designing a relational function that links the rudder angle, heading angle, and the central angle of the circle grid. Finally, obstacle avoidance is achieved by leveraging the on-line trajectory generator to choose a safe, smooth, and efficient path for the USV. The experimental results indicate that the proposed method can avoid both static and dynamic obstacles, have better performance in terms of distance cost and steering cost comparing with the related methods, and our method only takes 50% steering cost of the grid-based method; the collision avoidance path not only conforms to the USV dynamic characteristic but also provides a reference of steering command.
summary: Aiming at an obstacle avoidance problem with dynamic constraints for Unmanned Surface Vehicle (USV), a method based on Circle Grid Trajectory Cell (CGTC) is proposed. Firstly, the ship model and standardization rules are constructed to develop and constrain the trajectory, respectively. Secondly, by analyzing the properties of the circle grid, the circle grid tree is produced to guide the motion of the USV. Then, the kinematics and dynamics of the USV are considered through the on-line trajectory generator by designing a relational function that links the rudder angle, heading angle, and the central angle of the circle grid. Finally, obstacle avoidance is achieved by leveraging the on-line trajectory generator to choose a safe, smooth, and efficient path for the USV. The experimental results indicate that the proposed method can avoid both static and dynamic obstacles, have better performance in terms of distance cost and steering cost comparing with the related methods, and our method only takes 50% steering cost of the grid-based method; the collision avoidance path not only conforms to the USV dynamic characteristic but also provides a reference of steering command.
abstract_zh: 针对无人水面艇(USV)动态约束避障问题，提出一种基于圆网格轨迹单元(CGTC)的避障方法。首先，构建船舶模型和标准化规则来分别开发和约束轨迹。其次，通过分析圆网格的特性，生成圆网格树来引导USV的运动。然后，通过在线轨迹生成器设计连接舵角、航向角和圆网格中心角的关系函数，考虑USV的运动学和动力学。最后，利用在线轨迹生成器为USV选择一条安全、平稳、高效的路径来实现避障。实验结果表明，该方法能够同时避开静态和动态障碍物，与相关方法相比，在距离成本和转向成本方面具有更好的性能，并且我们的方法仅需要基于网格的方法的50%的转向成本；避碰路径不仅符合USV动态特性，而且为操舵指令提供参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于圆网格轨迹单元（CGTC）的方法，用于解决无人水面船（USV）的避障运动规划问题，通过动态约束和轨迹生成实现安全、平滑的路径规划。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理USV动态约束和避障效率方面存在不足，需设计更符合船舶运动特性的路径规划方法以降低转向成本并提升避障性能。
AI.method: 构建船舶运动模型与轨迹标准化规则，分析圆网格特性生成圆网格树引导运动，设计关联舵角、航向角与圆网格中心角的函数，通过在线轨迹生成器实现避障路径规划。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法可有效避开静态和动态障碍物，距离成本和转向成本优于相关方法，转向成本仅为基于网格方法的50%，且路径符合USV动力学特性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的圆网格方法在满足USV动态特性的同时，提供了高效、安全的避障路径，为实际应用中的转向指令规划提供了参考。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，该方法可有效避开静态和动态障碍物，距离成本和转向成本优于相关方法，转向成本仅为基于网格方法的50%，且路径符合USV动力学特性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 提出的圆网格方法在满足USV动态特性的同时，提供了高效、安全的避障路径，为实际应用中的转向指令规划提供了参考。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于圆网格轨迹单元（CGTC）的方法，用于解决无人水面船（USV）的避障运动规划问题，通过动态约束和轨迹生成实现安全、平滑的路径规划。
motivation: 现有方法在处理USV动态约束和避障效率方面存在不足，需设计更符合船舶运动特性的路径规划方法以降低转向成本并提升避障性能。
method: 构建船舶运动模型与轨迹标准化规则，分析圆网格特性生成圆网格树引导运动，设计关联舵角、航向角与圆网格中心角的函数，通过在线轨迹生成器实现避障路径规划。
result: 实验表明，该方法可有效避开静态和动态障碍物，距离成本和转向成本优于相关方法，转向成本仅为基于网格方法的50%，且路径符合USV动力学特性。
conclusion: 提出的圆网格方法在满足USV动态特性的同时，提供了高效、安全的避障路径，为实际应用中的转向指令规划提供了参考。
search_text: A Circle Grid-based Approach for Obstacle Avoidance Motion Planning of Unmanned Surface Vehicles 基于圆网格的无人地面车辆避障运动规划方法 Aiming at an obstacle avoidance problem with dynamic constraints for Unmanned Surface Vehicle (USV), a method based on Circle Grid Trajectory Cell (CGTC) is proposed. Firstly, the ship model and standardization rules are constructed to develop and constrain the trajectory, respectively. Secondly, by analyzing the properties of the circle grid, the circle grid tree is produced to guide the motion of the USV. Then, the kinematics and dynamics of the USV are considered through the on-line trajectory generator by designing a relational function that links the rudder angle, heading angle, and the central angle of the circle grid. Finally, obstacle avoidance is achieved by leveraging the on-line trajectory generator to choose a safe, smooth, and efficient path for the USV. The experimental results indicate that the proposed method can avoid both static and dynamic obstacles, have better performance in terms of distance cost and steering cost comparing with the related methods, and our method only takes 50% steering cost of the grid-based method; the collision avoidance path not only conforms to the USV dynamic characteristic but also provides a reference of steering command. 针对无人水面艇(USV)动态约束避障问题，提出一种基于圆网格轨迹单元(CGTC)的避障方法。首先，构建船舶模型和标准化规则来分别开发和约束轨迹。其次，通过分析圆网格的特性，生成圆网格树来引导USV的运动。然后，通过在线轨迹生成器设计连接舵角、航向角和圆网格中心角的关系函数，考虑USV的运动学和动力学。最后，利用在线轨迹生成器为USV选择一条安全、平稳、高效的路径来实现避障。实验结果表明，该方法能够同时避开静态和动态障碍物，与相关方法相比，在距离成本和转向成本方面具有更好的性能，并且我们的方法仅需要基于网格的方法的50%的转向成本；避碰路径不仅符合USV动态特性，而且为操舵指令提供参考。 本文提出了一种基于圆网格轨迹单元（CGTC）的方法，用于解决无人水面船（USV）的避障运动规划问题，通过动态约束和轨迹生成实现安全、平滑的路径规划。 Man Zhu,Changshi Xiao,Shangding Gu,Zhe Du,Yuanqiao Wen cs.RO

authors_text: Julian Schmidt,Julian Jordan,Franz Gritschneder,Klaus Dietmayer
title: CRAT-Pred: Vehicle Trajectory Prediction with Crystal Graph Convolutional Neural Networks and Multi-Head Self-Attention
title_zh: CRAT-Pred：利用晶体图卷积神经网络和多头自注意力进行车辆轨迹预测
comment: To appear in the proceedings of 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: To appear in the proceedings of 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Predicting the motion of surrounding vehicles is essential for autonomous vehicles, as it governs their own motion plan. Current state-of-the-art vehicle prediction models heavily rely on map information. In reality, however, this information is not always available. We therefore propose CRAT-Pred, a multi-modal and non-rasterization-based trajectory prediction model, specifically designed to effectively model social interactions between vehicles, without relying on map information. CRAT-Pred applies a graph convolution method originating from the field of material science to vehicle prediction, allowing to efficiently leverage edge features, and combines it with multi-head self-attention. Compared to other map-free approaches, the model achieves state-of-the-art performance with a significantly lower number of model parameters. In addition to that, we quantitatively show that the self-attention mechanism is able to learn social interactions between vehicles, with the weights representing a measurable interaction score. The source code is publicly available.
summary: Predicting the motion of surrounding vehicles is essential for autonomous vehicles, as it governs their own motion plan. Current state-of-the-art vehicle prediction models heavily rely on map information. In reality, however, this information is not always available. We therefore propose CRAT-Pred, a multi-modal and non-rasterization-based trajectory prediction model, specifically designed to effectively model social interactions between vehicles, without relying on map information. CRAT-Pred applies a graph convolution method originating from the field of material science to vehicle prediction, allowing to efficiently leverage edge features, and combines it with multi-head self-attention. Compared to other map-free approaches, the model achieves state-of-the-art performance with a significantly lower number of model parameters. In addition to that, we quantitatively show that the self-attention mechanism is able to learn social interactions between vehicles, with the weights representing a measurable interaction score. The source code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 预测周围车辆的运动对于自动驾驶车辆至关重要，因为它控制着它们自己的运动计划。当前最先进的车辆预测模型严重依赖于地图信息。但实际上，这些信息并不总是可用。因此，我们提出了 CRAT-Pred，一种多模态和非光栅化的轨迹预测模型，专门设计用于有效地模拟车辆之间的社交互动，而不依赖于地图信息。 CRAT-Pred将源自材料科学领域的图卷积方法应用于车辆预测，可以有效利用边缘特征，并将其与多头自注意力相结合。与其他无地图方法相比，该模型以显着减少的模型参数数量实现了最先进的性能。除此之外，我们定量地表明，自注意力机制能够学习车辆之间的社交互动，权重代表可测量的互动得分。源代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRAT-Pred模型，用于在无地图信息的情况下预测车辆轨迹，通过结合晶体图卷积和多头自注意力机制建模车辆间社会交互。
AI.motivation: 现有车辆轨迹预测模型依赖地图信息，但实际场景中地图数据常不可用，需开发无需地图且能有效建模车辆交互的预测方法。
AI.method: 采用材料科学领域的晶体图卷积网络提取边缘特征，并结合多头自注意力机制捕捉车辆间社会交互关系，实现非栅格化的多模态轨迹预测。
AI.result: 在参数量显著更少的情况下达到SOTA性能，定量证明自注意力机制能学习车辆交互并量化交互得分。
AI.conclusion: CRAT-Pred验证了晶体图卷积与自注意力结合在无地图场景下的有效性，为自动驾驶提供了高效且可解释的轨迹预测方案。

authors_text: Rui Yang,Yiming Lu,Wenzhe Li,Hao Sun,Meng Fang,Yali Du,Xiu Li,Lei Han,Chongjie Zhang
title: Rethinking Goal-conditioned Supervised Learning and Its Connection to Offline RL
title_zh: 重新思考目标条件监督学习及其与离线强化学习的联系
comment: Accepted by International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2022
comments: Accepted by International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2022
abstract: Solving goal-conditioned tasks with sparse rewards using self-supervised learning is promising because of its simplicity and stability over current reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms. A recent work, called Goal-Conditioned Supervised Learning (GCSL), provides a new learning framework by iteratively relabeling and imitating self-generated experiences. In this paper, we revisit the theoretical property of GCSL -- optimizing a lower bound of the goal reaching objective, and extend GCSL as a novel offline goal-conditioned RL algorithm. The proposed method is named Weighted GCSL (WGCSL), in which we introduce an advanced compound weight consisting of three parts (1) discounted weight for goal relabeling, (2) goal-conditioned exponential advantage weight, and (3) best-advantage weight. Theoretically, WGCSL is proved to optimize an equivalent lower bound of the goal-conditioned RL objective and generates monotonically improved policies via an iterated scheme. The monotonic property holds for any behavior policies, and therefore WGCSL can be applied to both online and offline settings. To evaluate algorithms in the offline goal-conditioned RL setting, we provide a benchmark including a range of point and simulated robot domains. Experiments in the introduced benchmark demonstrate that WGCSL can consistently outperform GCSL and existing state-of-the-art offline methods in the fully offline goal-conditioned setting.
summary: Solving goal-conditioned tasks with sparse rewards using self-supervised learning is promising because of its simplicity and stability over current reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms. A recent work, called Goal-Conditioned Supervised Learning (GCSL), provides a new learning framework by iteratively relabeling and imitating self-generated experiences. In this paper, we revisit the theoretical property of GCSL -- optimizing a lower bound of the goal reaching objective, and extend GCSL as a novel offline goal-conditioned RL algorithm. The proposed method is named Weighted GCSL (WGCSL), in which we introduce an advanced compound weight consisting of three parts (1) discounted weight for goal relabeling, (2) goal-conditioned exponential advantage weight, and (3) best-advantage weight. Theoretically, WGCSL is proved to optimize an equivalent lower bound of the goal-conditioned RL objective and generates monotonically improved policies via an iterated scheme. The monotonic property holds for any behavior policies, and therefore WGCSL can be applied to both online and offline settings. To evaluate algorithms in the offline goal-conditioned RL setting, we provide a benchmark including a range of point and simulated robot domains. Experiments in the introduced benchmark demonstrate that WGCSL can consistently outperform GCSL and existing state-of-the-art offline methods in the fully offline goal-conditioned setting.
abstract_zh: 使用自监督学习解决具有稀疏奖励的目标条件任务是有前途的，因为它相对于当前的强化学习（RL）算法来说简单且稳定。最近的一项名为目标条件监督学习（GCSL）的工作通过迭代地重新标记和模仿自我生成的经验提供了一个新的学习框架。在本文中，我们重新审视 GCSL 的理论特性——优化目标达到目标的下界，并将 GCSL 扩展为一种新颖的离线目标条件强化学习算法。所提出的方法被称为加权GCSL（WGCSL），其中我们引入了一种高级复合权重，由三部分组成：（1）用于目标重新标记的折扣权重，（2）目标条件指数优势权重，以及（3）最佳优势权重。理论上，WGCSL 被证明可以优化目标条件 RL 目标的等效下界，并通过迭代方案生成单调改进的策略。单调属性适用于任何行为策略，因此 WGCSL 可以应用于在线和离线设置。为了评估离线目标条件强化学习设置中的算法，我们提供了一个基准，包括一系列点和模拟机器人域。引入的基准测试中的实验表明，WGCSL 在完全离线目标条件设置中始终能够优于 GCSL 和现有最先进的离线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文重新思考了目标条件监督学习（GCSL）的理论性质，并将其扩展为一种新型离线目标条件强化学习算法。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习算法在处理稀疏奖励的目标条件任务时存在稳定性与简单性不足的问题，而GCSL通过自监督学习展现出潜力，但需进一步理论验证与改进。
AI.method: 提出加权GCSL（WGCSL）方法，引入包含折扣权重、目标条件指数优势权重和最佳优势权重的复合权重机制，理论证明其优化目标条件RL的下界并保证策略单调改进。
AI.result: 在点机器人和模拟机器人领域的离线基准测试中，WGCSL在完全离线目标条件设置下持续优于GCSL及现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: WGCSL通过理论保证与实验验证，成为适用于在线与离线场景的高效目标条件强化学习框架。

The monotonic property holds for any behavior policies, and therefore WGCSL can be applied to both online and offline settings. To evaluate algorithms in the offline goal-conditioned RL setting, we provide a benchmark including a range of point and simulated robot domains. Experiments in the introduced benchmark demonstrate that WGCSL can consistently outperform GCSL and existing state-of-the-art offline methods in the fully offline goal-conditioned setting. 使用自监督学习解决具有稀疏奖励的目标条件任务是有前途的，因为它相对于当前的强化学习（RL）算法来说简单且稳定。最近的一项名为目标条件监督学习（GCSL）的工作通过迭代地重新标记和模仿自我生成的经验提供了一个新的学习框架。在本文中，我们重新审视 GCSL 的理论特性——优化目标达到目标的下界，并将 GCSL 扩展为一种新颖的离线目标条件强化学习算法。所提出的方法被称为加权GCSL（WGCSL），其中我们引入了一种高级复合权重，由三部分组成：（1）用于目标重新标记的折扣权重，（2）目标条件指数优势权重，以及（3）最佳优势权重。理论上，WGCSL 被证明可以优化目标条件 RL 目标的等效下界，并通过迭代方案生成单调改进的策略。单调属性适用于任何行为策略，因此 WGCSL 可以应用于在线和离线设置。为了评估离线目标条件强化学习设置中的算法，我们提供了一个基准，包括一系列点和模拟机器人域。引入的基准测试中的实验表明，WGCSL 在完全离线目标条件设置中始终能够优于 GCSL 和现有最先进的离线方法。 本文重新思考了目标条件监督学习（GCSL）的理论性质，并将其扩展为一种新型离线目标条件强化学习算法。 Rui Yang,Yiming Lu,Wenzhe Li,Hao Sun,Meng Fang,Yali Du,Xiu Li,Lei Han,Chongjie Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zahra Gharaee
title: Predicting the intended action using internal simulation of perception
title_zh: 使用感知的内部模拟来预测预期的行动
abstract: This article proposes an architecture, which allows the prediction of intention by internally simulating perceptual states represented by action pattern vectors. To this end, associative self-organising neural networks (A-SOM) is utilised to build a hierarchical cognitive architecture for recognition and simulation of the skeleton based human actions. The abilities of the proposed architecture in recognising and predicting actions is evaluated in experiments using three different datasets of 3D actions. Based on the experiments of this article, applying internally simulated perceptual states represented by action pattern vectors improves the performance of the recognition task in all experiments. Furthermore, internal simulation of perception addresses the problem of having limited access to the sensory input, and also the future prediction of the consecutive perceptual sequences. The performance of the system is compared and discussed with similar architecture using self-organizing neural networks (SOM).
summary: This article proposes an architecture, which allows the prediction of intention by internally simulating perceptual states represented by action pattern vectors. To this end, associative self-organising neural networks (A-SOM) is utilised to build a hierarchical cognitive architecture for recognition and simulation of the skeleton based human actions. The abilities of the proposed architecture in recognising and predicting actions is evaluated in experiments using three different datasets of 3D actions. Based on the experiments of this article, applying internally simulated perceptual states represented by action pattern vectors improves the performance of the recognition task in all experiments. Furthermore, internal simulation of perception addresses the problem of having limited access to the sensory input, and also the future prediction of the consecutive perceptual sequences. The performance of the system is compared and discussed with similar architecture using self-organizing neural networks (SOM).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种架构，它允许通过内部模拟由动作模式向量表示的感知状态来预测意图。为此，利用关联自组织神经网络（A-SOM）构建分层认知架构，用于识别和模拟基于骨骼的人类行为。使用三个不同的 3D 动作数据集在实验中评估所提出的架构识别和预测动作的能力。基于本文的实验，应用由动作模式向量表示的内部模拟感知状态提高了所有实验中识别任务的性能。此外，感知的内部模拟解决了对感官输入的访问受限以及连续感知序列的未来预测的问题。使用自组织神经网络（SOM）对系统的性能与类似架构进行了比较和讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于内部感知模拟的架构，利用关联自组织神经网络（A-SOM）预测人类动作意图。
AI.motivation: 解决传统方法在感官输入受限时动作预测准确性不足的问题，并提升未来感知序列的预测能力。
AI.method: 构建分层认知架构，通过A-SOM网络学习并模拟骨骼动作的感知状态，使用3D动作数据集进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上均提升动作识别性能，有效应对感官输入限制和未来序列预测挑战，优于传统SOM架构。
AI.conclusion: 内部感知模拟方法能显著提升意图预测准确性，为有限感知条件下的动作理解提供新思路。

authors_text: Dimos Makris,Guo Zixun,Maximos Kaliakatsos-Papakostas,Dorien Herremans
title: Conditional Drums Generation using Compound Word Representations
title_zh: 使用复合词表示的条件鼓生成
comment: Accepted for the 11th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Music, Sound, Art and Design (EvoMUSART), 2022
comments: Accepted for the 11th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Music, Sound, Art and Design (EvoMUSART), 2022
abstract: The field of automatic music composition has seen great progress in recent years, specifically with the invention of transformer-based architectures. When using any deep learning model which considers music as a sequence of events with multiple complex dependencies, the selection of a proper data representation is crucial. In this paper, we tackle the task of conditional drums generation using a novel data encoding scheme inspired by the Compound Word representation, a tokenization process of sequential data. Therefore, we present a sequence-to-sequence architecture where a Bidirectional Long short-term memory (BiLSTM) Encoder receives information about the conditioning parameters (i.e., accompanying tracks and musical attributes), while a Transformer-based Decoder with relative global attention produces the generated drum sequences. We conducted experiments to thoroughly compare the effectiveness of our method to several baselines. Quantitative evaluation shows that our model is able to generate drums sequences that have similar statistical distributions and characteristics to the training corpus. These features include syncopation, compression ratio, and symmetry among others. We also verified, through a listening test, that generated drum sequences sound pleasant, natural and coherent while they "groove" with the given accompaniment.
summary: The field of automatic music composition has seen great progress in recent years, specifically with the invention of transformer-based architectures. When using any deep learning model which considers music as a sequence of events with multiple complex dependencies, the selection of a proper data representation is crucial. In this paper, we tackle the task of conditional drums generation using a novel data encoding scheme inspired by the Compound Word representation, a tokenization process of sequential data. Therefore, we present a sequence-to-sequence architecture where a Bidirectional Long short-term memory (BiLSTM) Encoder receives information about the conditioning parameters (i.e., accompanying tracks and musical attributes), while a Transformer-based Decoder with relative global attention produces the generated drum sequences. We conducted experiments to thoroughly compare the effectiveness of our method to several baselines. Quantitative evaluation shows that our model is able to generate drums sequences that have similar statistical distributions and characteristics to the training corpus. These features include syncopation, compression ratio, and symmetry among others. We also verified, through a listening test, that generated drum sequences sound pleasant, natural and coherent while they "groove" with the given accompaniment.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自动音乐创作领域取得了巨大进步，特别是随着基于变压器的架构的发明。当使用任何将音乐视为具有多个复杂依赖性的事件序列的深度学习模型时，选择正确的数据表示至关重要。在本文中，我们使用受复合词表示（顺序数据的标记化过程）启发的新颖数据编码方案来解决条件鼓生成的任务。因此，我们提出了一种序列到序列的架构，其中双向长短期记忆（BiLSTM）编码器接收有关调节参数（即伴随曲目和音乐属性）的信息，而具有相对全局注意力的基于 Transformer 的解码器生成生成的鼓序列。我们进行了实验，以彻底比较我们的方法与几个基线的有效性。定量评估表明，我们的模型能够生成与训练语料库具有相似统计分布和特征的鼓序列。这些功能包括切分音、压缩比和对称性等。我们还通过听力测试验证了生成的鼓序列在与给定伴奏“律动”时听起来令人愉悦、自然且连贯。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于复合词表示的条件鼓点生成方法，通过序列到序列架构结合BiLSTM编码器和Transformer解码器实现鼓点序列生成。
AI.motivation: 在自动音乐创作领域，深度学习模型需要有效的数据表示来捕捉音乐序列中的复杂依赖关系，而现有方法在鼓点生成任务中存在表示不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计了包含BiLSTM编码器（处理伴奏轨道和音乐属性条件参数）与带相对全局注意力机制的Transformer解码器的序列到序列框架，采用复合词表示法对鼓点数据进行编码。
AI.result: 定量评估显示生成序列在同步化、压缩比、对称性等统计特征上与训练集一致，听觉测试验证了生成鼓点的自然性、连贯性和与伴奏的协调性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过创新的数据表示和架构设计，有效实现了条件鼓点生成，在客观指标和主观评价上均表现出色。

authors_text: Marcel Schreiber,Vasileios Belagiannis,Claudius Gläser,Klaus Dietmayer
title: A Multi-Task Recurrent Neural Network for End-to-End Dynamic Occupancy Grid Mapping
title_zh: 用于端到端动态占用网格映射的多任务循环神经网络
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2022 33rd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) (IV 2022), June 5-9, 2022, in Aachen, Germany
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 2022 33rd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) (IV 2022), June 5-9, 2022, in Aachen, Germany
abstract: A common approach for modeling the environment of an autonomous vehicle are dynamic occupancy grid maps, in which the surrounding is divided into cells, each containing the occupancy and velocity state of its location. Despite the advantage of modeling arbitrary shaped objects, the used algorithms rely on hand-designed inverse sensor models and semantic information is missing. Therefore, we introduce a multi-task recurrent neural network to predict grid maps providing occupancies, velocity estimates, semantic information and the driveable area. During training, our network architecture, which is a combination of convolutional and recurrent layers, processes sequences of raw lidar data, that is represented as bird's eye view images with several height channels. The multi-task network is trained in an end-to-end fashion to predict occupancy grid maps without the usual preprocessing steps consisting of removing ground points and applying an inverse sensor model. In our evaluations, we show that our learned inverse sensor model is able to overcome some limitations of a geometric inverse sensor model in terms of representing object shapes and modeling freespace. Moreover, we report a better runtime performance and more accurate semantic predictions for our end-to-end approach, compared to our network relying on measurement grid maps as input data.
summary: A common approach for modeling the environment of an autonomous vehicle are dynamic occupancy grid maps, in which the surrounding is divided into cells, each containing the occupancy and velocity state of its location. Despite the advantage of modeling arbitrary shaped objects, the used algorithms rely on hand-designed inverse sensor models and semantic information is missing. Therefore, we introduce a multi-task recurrent neural network to predict grid maps providing occupancies, velocity estimates, semantic information and the driveable area. During training, our network architecture, which is a combination of convolutional and recurrent layers, processes sequences of raw lidar data, that is represented as bird's eye view images with several height channels. The multi-task network is trained in an end-to-end fashion to predict occupancy grid maps without the usual preprocessing steps consisting of removing ground points and applying an inverse sensor model. In our evaluations, we show that our learned inverse sensor model is able to overcome some limitations of a geometric inverse sensor model in terms of representing object shapes and modeling freespace. Moreover, we report a better runtime performance and more accurate semantic predictions for our end-to-end approach, compared to our network relying on measurement grid maps as input data.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶车辆环境建模的常用方法是动态占用网格图，其中周围环境被划分为多个单元，每个单元包含其位置的占用和速度状态。尽管具有对任意形状的物体进行建模的优势，但所使用的算法依赖于手工设计的逆传感器模型，并且缺少语义信息。因此，我们引入了多任务循环神经网络来预测网格地图，提供占用率、速度估计、语义信息和可驾驶区域。在训练过程中，我们的网络架构是卷积层和循环层的组合，处理原始激光雷达数据序列，这些数据表示为具有多个高度通道的鸟瞰图图像。多任务网络以端到端的方式进行训练，以预测占用网格图，而无需通常的预处理步骤（包括删除地面点和应用逆传感器模型）。在我们的评估中，我们表明我们学习的逆传感器模型能够克服几何逆传感器模型在表示对象形状和建模自由空间方面的一些限制。此外，与依赖测量网格图作为输入数据的网络相比，我们的端到端方法具有更好的运行时性能和更准确的语义预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多任务循环神经网络，用于端到端的动态占用网格映射，以预测自动驾驶车辆周围环境的占用状态、速度估计、语义信息和可行驶区域。
AI.motivation: 传统动态占用网格映射方法依赖手工设计的逆传感器模型且缺乏语义信息，限制了其在复杂环境中的表现。
AI.method: 结合卷积层和循环层的多任务网络架构，直接处理原始LiDAR数据生成鸟瞰图，端到端训练无需预处理步骤（如地面点去除或逆传感器模型）。
AI.result: 实验表明，所学逆传感器模型在物体形状表示和自由空间建模上优于几何模型，且端到端方法在运行时性能和语义预测准确性上优于基于测量网格地图的网络。
AI.conclusion: 端到端学习的多任务网络能够有效克服传统方法的局限性，在动态环境建模和语义理解方面表现出更高的效率和准确性。

search_text: A Multi-Task Recurrent Neural Network for End-to-End Dynamic Occupancy Grid Mapping 用于端到端动态占用网格映射的多任务循环神经网络 A common approach for modeling the environment of an autonomous vehicle are dynamic occupancy grid maps, in which the surrounding is divided into cells, each containing the occupancy and velocity state of its location. Despite the advantage of modeling arbitrary shaped objects, the used algorithms rely on hand-designed inverse sensor models and semantic information is missing. Therefore, we introduce a multi-task recurrent neural network to predict grid maps providing occupancies, velocity estimates, semantic information and the driveable area. During training, our network architecture, which is a combination of convolutional and recurrent layers, processes sequences of raw lidar data, that is represented as bird's eye view images with several height channels. The multi-task network is trained in an end-to-end fashion to predict occupancy grid maps without the usual preprocessing steps consisting of removing ground points and applying an inverse sensor model. In our evaluations, we show that our learned inverse sensor model is able to overcome some limitations of a geometric inverse sensor model in terms of representing object shapes and modeling freespace. Moreover, we report a better runtime performance and more accurate semantic predictions for our end-to-end approach, compared to our network relying on measurement grid maps as input data. 自动驾驶车辆环境建模的常用方法是动态占用网格图，其中周围环境被划分为多个单元，每个单元包含其位置的占用和速度状态。尽管具有对任意形状的物体进行建模的优势，但所使用的算法依赖于手工设计的逆传感器模型，并且缺少语义信息。因此，我们引入了多任务循环神经网络来预测网格地图，提供占用率、速度估计、语义信息和可驾驶区域。在训练过程中，我们的网络架构是卷积层和循环层的组合，处理原始激光雷达数据序列，这些数据表示为具有多个高度通道的鸟瞰图图像。多任务网络以端到端的方式进行训练，以预测占用网格图，而无需通常的预处理步骤（包括删除地面点和应用逆传感器模型）。在我们的评估中，我们表明我们学习的逆传感器模型能够克服几何逆传感器模型在表示对象形状和建模自由空间方面的一些限制。此外，与依赖测量网格图作为输入数据的网络相比，我们的端到端方法具有更好的运行时性能和更准确的语义预测。 本文提出了一种多任务循环神经网络，用于端到端的动态占用网格映射，以预测自动驾驶车辆周围环境的占用状态、速度估计、语义信息和可行驶区域。 Marcel Schreiber,Vasileios Belagiannis,Claudius Gläser,Klaus Dietmayer cs.RO

authors_text: Assia Benbihi,Cédric Pradalier,Ondřej Chum
title: Object-Guided Day-Night Visual Localization in Urban Scenes
title_zh: 城市场景中对象引导的昼夜视觉定位
abstract: We introduce Object-Guided Localization (OGuL) based on a novel method of local-feature matching. Direct matching of local features is sensitive to significant changes in illumination. In contrast, object detection often survives severe changes in lighting conditions. The proposed method first detects semantic objects and establishes correspondences of those objects between images. Object correspondences provide local coarse alignment of the images in the form of a planar homography. These homographies are consequently used to guide the matching of local features. Experiments on standard urban localization datasets (Aachen, Extended-CMU-Season, RobotCar-Season) show that OGuL significantly improves localization results with as simple local features as SIFT, and its performance competes with the state-of-the-art CNN-based methods trained for day-to-night localization.
summary: We introduce Object-Guided Localization (OGuL) based on a novel method of local-feature matching. Direct matching of local features is sensitive to significant changes in illumination. In contrast, object detection often survives severe changes in lighting conditions. The proposed method first detects semantic objects and establishes correspondences of those objects between images. Object correspondences provide local coarse alignment of the images in the form of a planar homography. These homographies are consequently used to guide the matching of local features. Experiments on standard urban localization datasets (Aachen, Extended-CMU-Season, RobotCar-Season) show that OGuL significantly improves localization results with as simple local features as SIFT, and its performance competes with the state-of-the-art CNN-based methods trained for day-to-night localization.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了基于局部特征匹配的新颖方法的对象引导定位（OGuL）。局部特征的直接匹配对光照的显着变化很敏感。相比之下，物体检测通常可以在光照条件发生剧烈变化时幸存下来。所提出的方法首先检测语义对象并建立图像之间这些对象的对应关系。对象对应以平面单应性的形式提供图像的局部粗对准。因此，这些单应性被用来指导局部特征的匹配。在标准城市定位数据集（Aachen、Extended-CMU-Season、RobotCar-Season）上进行的实验表明，OGuL 通过像 SIFT 这样简单的局部特征显着改善了定位结果，其性能可与最先进的基于 CNN 的昼夜定位训练方法相媲美。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于物体引导的局部特征匹配方法，用于城市场景中的昼夜视觉定位。
AI.motivation: 传统局部特征匹配对光照变化敏感，而物体检测在光照变化下更鲁棒，因此通过物体引导提升定位稳定性。
AI.method: 检测语义物体并建立图像间对应关系，生成平面单应性以指导局部特征匹配。
AI.result: 在Aachen、Extended-CMU-Season、RobotCar-Season等数据集上，OGuL显著提升定位精度，性能优于CNN基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 物体引导方法有效缓解光照变化影响，以简单特征实现高精度昼夜定位，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jian Zhao,Yue Zhang,Xunhan Hu,Weixun Wang,Wengang Zhou,Jianye Hao,Jiangcheng Zhu,Houqiang Li
title: Revisiting QMIX: Discriminative Credit Assignment by Gradient Entropy Regularization
title_zh: 重温 QMIX：通过梯度熵正则化进行歧视性信用分配
abstract: In cooperative multi-agent systems, agents jointly take actions and receive a team reward instead of individual rewards. In the absence of individual reward signals, credit assignment mechanisms are usually introduced to discriminate the contributions of different agents so as to achieve effective cooperation. Recently, the value decomposition paradigm has been widely adopted to realize credit assignment, and QMIX has become the state-of-the-art solution. In this paper, we revisit QMIX from two aspects. First, we propose a new perspective on credit assignment measurement and empirically show that QMIX suffers limited discriminability on the assignment of credits to agents. Second, we propose a gradient entropy regularization with QMIX to realize a discriminative credit assignment, thereby improving the overall performance. The experiments demonstrate that our approach can comparatively improve learning efficiency and achieve better performance.
summary: In cooperative multi-agent systems, agents jointly take actions and receive a team reward instead of individual rewards. In the absence of individual reward signals, credit assignment mechanisms are usually introduced to discriminate the contributions of different agents so as to achieve effective cooperation. Recently, the value decomposition paradigm has been widely adopted to realize credit assignment, and QMIX has become the state-of-the-art solution. In this paper, we revisit QMIX from two aspects. First, we propose a new perspective on credit assignment measurement and empirically show that QMIX suffers limited discriminability on the assignment of credits to agents. Second, we propose a gradient entropy regularization with QMIX to realize a discriminative credit assignment, thereby improving the overall performance. The experiments demonstrate that our approach can comparatively improve learning efficiency and achieve better performance.
abstract_zh: 在协作多智能体系统中，智能体共同采取行动并获得团队奖励而不是个人奖励。在缺乏个体奖励信号的情况下，通常引入信用分配机制来区分不同智能体的贡献，从而实现有效的合作。近年来，价值分解范式已被广泛采用来实现信用分配，而QMIX已成为最先进的解决方案。在本文中，我们从两个方面重新审视 QMIX。首先，我们提出了信用分配衡量的新视角，并通过实证表明 QMIX 在向代理人分配信用方面的可区分性有限。其次，我们提出了使用 QMIX 的梯度熵正则化来实现有区别的信用分配，从而提高整体性能。实验表明，我们的方法可以相对提高学习效率并取得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 重新审视QMIX算法，提出基于梯度熵正则化的判别性信用分配方法以提升多智能体协作性能
AI.motivation: 现有QMIX算法在信用分配中存在辨别力不足的问题，需提升多智能体协作效率
AI.method: 通过引入梯度熵正则化机制优化QMIX的信用分配过程，增强智能体贡献区分度
AI.result: 实验验证该方法有效提升学习效率和任务表现，优于基线方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的新方法有效解决了QMIX的信用分配局限性，在多智能体协作任务中展现出优越性

First, we propose a new perspective on credit assignment measurement and empirically show that QMIX suffers limited discriminability on the assignment of credits to agents. Second, we propose a gradient entropy regularization with QMIX to realize a discriminative credit assignment, thereby improving the overall performance. The experiments demonstrate that our approach can comparatively improve learning efficiency and achieve better performance. 在协作多智能体系统中，智能体共同采取行动并获得团队奖励而不是个人奖励。在缺乏个体奖励信号的情况下，通常引入信用分配机制来区分不同智能体的贡献，从而实现有效的合作。近年来，价值分解范式已被广泛采用来实现信用分配，而QMIX已成为最先进的解决方案。在本文中，我们从两个方面重新审视 QMIX。首先，我们提出了信用分配衡量的新视角，并通过实证表明 QMIX 在向代理人分配信用方面的可区分性有限。其次，我们提出了使用 QMIX 的梯度熵正则化来实现有区别的信用分配，从而提高整体性能。实验表明，我们的方法可以相对提高学习效率并取得更好的性能。 重新审视QMIX算法，提出基于梯度熵正则化的判别性信用分配方法以提升多智能体协作性能 Jian Zhao,Yue Zhang,Xunhan Hu,Weixun Wang,Wengang Zhou,Jianye Hao,Jiangcheng Zhu,Houqiang Li cs.AI

authors_text: Son Truong Nguyen,Nguyen Quang Tuyen,Nguyen Hong Phuc
title: Deep Feature Rotation for Multimodal Image Style Transfer
title_zh: 用于多模态图像风格迁移的深度特征旋转
abstract: Recently, style transfer is a research area that attracts a lot of attention, which transfers the style of an image onto a content target. Extensive research on style transfer has aimed at speeding up processing or generating high-quality stylized images. Most approaches only produce an output from a content and style image pair, while a few others use complex architectures and can only produce a certain number of outputs. In this paper, we propose a simple method for representing style features in many ways called Deep Feature Rotation (DFR), while not only producing diverse outputs but also still achieving effective stylization compared to more complex methods. Our approach is representative of the many ways of augmentation for intermediate feature embedding without consuming too much computational expense. We also analyze our method by visualizing output in different rotation weights. Our code is available at https://github.com/sonnguyen129/deep-feature-rotation.
summary: Recently, style transfer is a research area that attracts a lot of attention, which transfers the style of an image onto a content target. Extensive research on style transfer has aimed at speeding up processing or generating high-quality stylized images. Most approaches only produce an output from a content and style image pair, while a few others use complex architectures and can only produce a certain number of outputs. In this paper, we propose a simple method for representing style features in many ways called Deep Feature Rotation (DFR), while not only producing diverse outputs but also still achieving effective stylization compared to more complex methods. Our approach is representative of the many ways of augmentation for intermediate feature embedding without consuming too much computational expense. We also analyze our method by visualizing output in different rotation weights. Our code is available at https://github.com/sonnguyen129/deep-feature-rotation.
abstract_zh: 最近，风格迁移是一个引起广泛关注的研究领域，它将图像的风格迁移到内容目标上。对风格迁移的广泛研究旨在加速处理或生成高质量的风格化图像。大多数方法仅从内容和风格图像对产生输出，而其他一些方法使用复杂的架构并且只能产生一定数量的输出。在本文中，我们提出了一种以多种方式表示风格特征的简单方法，称为深度特征旋转（DFR），与更复杂的方法相比，不仅产生不同的输出，而且仍然实现有效的风格化。我们的方法代表了中间特征嵌入的多种增强方法，而无需消耗太多的计算费用。我们还通过可视化不同旋转权重的输出来分析我们的方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/sonnguyen129/deep-feature-rotation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为深度特征旋转（DFR）的方法，用于多模态图像风格迁移，能够在不增加计算成本的情况下生成多样化的风格化输出。
AI.motivation: 现有风格迁移方法在处理速度与生成质量或模型复杂度与输出多样性之间存在权衡，亟需一种高效且能生成多样结果的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过旋转中间特征嵌入的深度特征，实现对风格特征的多样化表示，无需复杂架构即可生成多种风格化输出。
AI.result: DFR方法在保持有效风格化效果的同时，相比复杂方法能生成更多样化的输出，并通过可视化不同旋转权重验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DFR提供了一种高效、灵活的多模态图像风格迁移方案，在计算成本与输出多样性之间取得了良好平衡。

authors_text: Shayan Jawed,Mofassir ul Islam Arif,Ahmed Rashed,Kiran Madhusudhanan,Shereen Elsayed,Mohsan Jameel,Alexei Volk,Andre Hintsches,Marlies Kornfeld,Katrin Lange,Lars Schmidt-Thieme
title: A.I. and Data-Driven Mobility at Volkswagen Financial Services AG
title_zh: 人工智能。大众汽车金融服务公司的数据驱动移动出行
abstract: Machine learning is being widely adapted in industrial applications owing to the capabilities of commercially available hardware and rapidly advancing research. Volkswagen Financial Services (VWFS), as a market leader in vehicle leasing services, aims to leverage existing proprietary data and the latest research to enhance existing and derive new business processes. The collaboration between Information Systems and Machine Learning Lab (ISMLL) and VWFS serves to realize this goal. In this paper, we propose methods in the fields of recommender systems, object detection, and forecasting that enable data-driven decisions for the vehicle life-cycle at VWFS.
summary: Machine learning is being widely adapted in industrial applications owing to the capabilities of commercially available hardware and rapidly advancing research. Volkswagen Financial Services (VWFS), as a market leader in vehicle leasing services, aims to leverage existing proprietary data and the latest research to enhance existing and derive new business processes. The collaboration between Information Systems and Machine Learning Lab (ISMLL) and VWFS serves to realize this goal. In this paper, we propose methods in the fields of recommender systems, object detection, and forecasting that enable data-driven decisions for the vehicle life-cycle at VWFS.
abstract_zh: 由于商用硬件的功能和快速推进的研究，机器学习正在广泛应用于工业应用。大众汽车金融服务公司 (VWFS) 作为汽车租赁服务的市场领导者，旨在利用现有的专有数据和最新研究来增强现有业务流程并衍生新的业务流程。信息系统和机器学习实验室 (ISMLL) 与 VWFS 之间的合作旨在实现这一目标。在本文中，我们提出了推荐系统、对象检测和预测领域的方法，使 VWFS 的车辆生命周期能够进行数据驱动的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出推荐系统、目标检测和预测方法，以支持VWFS在车辆生命周期中的数据驱动决策。
AI.motivation: 随着硬件和AI研究的进步，VWFS希望通过数据驱动的方法优化车辆租赁服务流程，提升业务效率和创新能力。
AI.method: 采用推荐系统优化客户建议，利用目标检测技术分析车辆状态，并通过预测模型进行需求预测，从而实现数据驱动的决策支持。
AI.result: 这些方法有效提升了VWFS在客户推荐、车辆状态监控和需求预测方面的决策效率和准确性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了AI技术在车辆金融服务业的应用潜力，为行业提供了可推广的数据驱动解决方案。

authors_text: Jie Chen,Chang Liu,Jiawu Xie,Jie An,Nan Huang
title: Time-Frequency Mask Aware Bi-directional LSTM: A Deep Learning Approach for Underwater Acoustic Signal Separation
title_zh: 时频模板感知双向 LSTM：水下声学信号分离的深度学习方法
abstract: The underwater acoustic signals separation is a key technique for the underwater communications. The existing methods are mostly model-based, and could not accurately characterise the practical underwater acoustic communication environment. They are only suitable for binary signal separation, but cannot handle multivariate signal separation. On the other hand, the recurrent neural network (RNN) shows powerful capability in extracting the features of the temporal sequences. Inspired by this, in this paper, we present a data-driven approach for underwater acoustic signals separation using deep learning technology. We use the Bi-directional Long Short-Term Memory (Bi-LSTM) to explore the features of Time-Frequency (T-F) mask, and propose a T-F mask aware Bi-LSTM for signal separation. Taking advantage of the sparseness of the T-F image, the designed Bi-LSTM network is able to extract the discriminative features for separation, which further improves the separation performance. In particular, this method breaks through the limitations of the existing methods, not only achieves good results in multivariate separation, but also effectively separates signals when mixed with 40dB Gaussian noise signals. The experimental results show that this method can achieve a $97\%$ guarantee ratio (PSR), and the average similarity coefficient of the multivariate signal separation is stable above 0.8 under high noise conditions.
summary: The underwater acoustic signals separation is a key technique for the underwater communications. The existing methods are mostly model-based, and could not accurately characterise the practical underwater acoustic communication environment. They are only suitable for binary signal separation, but cannot handle multivariate signal separation. On the other hand, the recurrent neural network (RNN) shows powerful capability in extracting the features of the temporal sequences. Inspired by this, in this paper, we present a data-driven approach for underwater acoustic signals separation using deep learning technology. We use the Bi-directional Long Short-Term Memory (Bi-LSTM) to explore the features of Time-Frequency (T-F) mask, and propose a T-F mask aware Bi-LSTM for signal separation. Taking advantage of the sparseness of the T-F image, the designed Bi-LSTM network is able to extract the discriminative features for separation, which further improves the separation performance. In particular, this method breaks through the limitations of the existing methods, not only achieves good results in multivariate separation, but also effectively separates signals when mixed with 40dB Gaussian noise signals. The experimental results show that this method can achieve a $97\%$ guarantee ratio (PSR), and the average similarity coefficient of the multivariate signal separation is stable above 0.8 under high noise conditions.
abstract_zh: 水声信号分离是水下通信的关键技术。现有的方法大多基于模型，无法准确表征实际的水声通信环境。它们仅适用于二元信号分离，而不能处理多元信号分离。另一方面，循环神经网络（RNN）在提取时间序列特征方面表现出强大的能力。受此启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种使用深度学习技术进行水声信号分离的数据驱动方法。我们使用双向长短期记忆（Bi-LSTM）来探索时频（T-F）掩模的特征，并提出一种用于信号分离的T-F掩模感知Bi-LSTM。利用T-F图像的稀疏性，设计的Bi-LSTM网络能够提取判别特征进行分离，进一步提高了分离性能。特别是，该方法突破了现有方法的限制，不仅在多变量分离方面取得了良好的效果，而且在与40dB高斯噪声信号混合时也能有效分离信号。实验结果表明，该方法可以达到97\%$的保证率（PSR），并且在高噪声条件下多元信号分离的平均相似系数稳定在0.8以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双向长短期记忆网络（Bi-LSTM）的时频掩码感知方法，用于解决水下声学信号分离问题。
AI.motivation: 现有水下声学信号分离方法多为模型驱动，难以准确表征实际环境且仅适用于二元信号分离，无法处理多变量信号及高噪声场景。
AI.method: 设计时频掩码感知的Bi-LSTM网络，利用时频图像稀疏性提取判别特征，突破传统方法限制实现多变量信号分离。
AI.result: 在40dB高斯噪声下，该方法分离信号的保证比（PSR）达97%，多变量信号相似系数稳定在0.8以上。
AI.conclusion: 提出的深度学习方法有效解决了水下声学信号分离的多变量性和高噪声挑战，实验验证了其优越性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双向长短期记忆网络（Bi-LSTM）的时频掩码感知方法，用于解决水下声学信号分离问题。

ai_content.result: 在40dB高斯噪声下，该方法分离信号的保证比（PSR）达97%，多变量信号相似系数稳定在0.8以上。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的深度学习方法有效解决了水下声学信号分离的多变量性和高噪声挑战，实验验证了其优越性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 提出的深度学习方法有效解决了水下声学信号分离的多变量性和高噪声挑战，实验验证了其优越性。

search_text: Time-Frequency Mask Aware Bi-directional LSTM: A Deep Learning Approach for Underwater Acoustic Signal Separation 时频模板感知双向 LSTM：水下声学信号分离的深度学习方法 The underwater acoustic signals separation is a key technique for the underwater communications. The existing methods are mostly model-based, and could not accurately characterise the practical underwater acoustic communication environment. They are only suitable for binary signal separation, but cannot handle multivariate signal separation. On the other hand, the recurrent neural network (RNN) shows powerful capability in extracting the features of the temporal sequences. Inspired by this, in this paper, we present a data-driven approach for underwater acoustic signals separation using deep learning technology. We use the Bi-directional Long Short-Term Memory (Bi-LSTM) to explore the features of Time-Frequency (T-F) mask, and propose a T-F mask aware Bi-LSTM for signal separation. Taking advantage of the sparseness of the T-F image, the designed Bi-LSTM network is able to extract the discriminative features for separation, which further improves the separation performance. In particular, this method breaks through the limitations of the existing methods, not only achieves good results in multivariate separation, but also effectively separates signals when mixed with 40dB Gaussian noise signals. The experimental results show that this method can achieve a $97\%$ guarantee ratio (PSR), and the average similarity coefficient of the multivariate signal separation is stable above 0.8 under high noise conditions. 水声信号分离是水下通信的关键技术。现有的方法大多基于模型，无法准确表征实际的水声通信环境。它们仅适用于二元信号分离，而不能处理多元信号分离。另一方面，循环神经网络（RNN）在提取时间序列特征方面表现出强大的能力。受此启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种使用深度学习技术进行水声信号分离的数据驱动方法。我们使用双向长短期记忆（Bi-LSTM）来探索时频（T-F）掩模的特征，并提出一种用于信号分离的T-F掩模感知Bi-LSTM。利用T-F图像的稀疏性，设计的Bi-LSTM网络能够提取判别特征进行分离，进一步提高了分离性能。特别是，该方法突破了现有方法的限制，不仅在多变量分离方面取得了良好的效果，而且在与40dB高斯噪声信号混合时也能有效分离信号。实验结果表明，该方法可以达到97\%$的保证率（PSR），并且在高噪声条件下多元信号分离的平均相似系数稳定在0.8以上。 本文提出一种基于双向长短期记忆网络（Bi-LSTM）的时频掩码感知方法，用于解决水下声学信号分离问题。 Jie Chen,Chang Liu,Jiawu Xie,Jie An,Nan Huang eess.SP,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: JM Gorriz,R. Martin-Clemente,C. G. Puntonet,A. Ortiz,J. Ramirez,J. Suckling
title: A hypothesis-driven method based on machine learning for neuroimaging data analysis
title_zh: 基于机器学习的假设驱动神经影像数据分析方法
abstract: There remains an open question about the usefulness and the interpretation of Machine learning (MLE) approaches for discrimination of spatial patterns of brain images between samples or activation states. In the last few decades, these approaches have limited their operation to feature extraction and linear classification tasks for between-group inference. In this context, statistical inference is assessed by randomly permuting image labels or by the use of random effect models that consider between-subject variability. These multivariate MLE-based statistical pipelines, whilst potentially more effective for detecting activations than hypotheses-driven methods, have lost their mathematical elegance, ease of interpretation, and spatial localization of the ubiquitous General linear Model (GLM). Recently, the estimation of the conventional GLM has been demonstrated to be connected to an univariate classification task when the design matrix is expressed as a binary indicator matrix. In this paper we explore the complete connection between the univariate GLM and MLE \emph{regressions}. To this purpose we derive a refined statistical test with the GLM based on the parameters obtained by a linear Support Vector Regression (SVR) in the \emph{inverse} problem (SVR-iGLM). Subsequently, random field theory (RFT) is employed for assessing statistical significance following a conventional GLM benchmark. Experimental results demonstrate how parameter estimations derived from each model (mainly GLM and SVR) result in different experimental design estimates that are significantly related to the predefined functional task. Moreover, using real data from a multisite initiative the proposed MLE-based inference demonstrates statistical power and the control of false positives, outperforming the regular GLM.
summary: There remains an open question about the usefulness and the interpretation of Machine learning (MLE) approaches for discrimination of spatial patterns of brain images between samples or activation states. In the last few decades, these approaches have limited their operation to feature extraction and linear classification tasks for between-group inference. In this context, statistical inference is assessed by randomly permuting image labels or by the use of random effect models that consider between-subject variability. These multivariate MLE-based statistical pipelines, whilst potentially more effective for detecting activations than hypotheses-driven methods, have lost their mathematical elegance, ease of interpretation, and spatial localization of the ubiquitous General linear Model (GLM). Recently, the estimation of the conventional GLM has been demonstrated to be connected to an univariate classification task when the design matrix is expressed as a binary indicator matrix. In this paper we explore the complete connection between the univariate GLM and MLE \emph{regressions}. To this purpose we derive a refined statistical test with the GLM based on the parameters obtained by a linear Support Vector Regression (SVR) in the \emph{inverse} problem (SVR-iGLM). Subsequently, random field theory (RFT) is employed for assessing statistical significance following a conventional GLM benchmark. Experimental results demonstrate how parameter estimations derived from each model (mainly GLM and SVR) result in different experimental design estimates that are significantly related to the predefined functional task. Moreover, using real data from a multisite initiative the proposed MLE-based inference demonstrates statistical power and the control of false positives, outperforming the regular GLM.
abstract_zh: 关于机器学习（MLE）方法用于区分样本或激活状态之间大脑图像的空间模式的有用性和解释仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在过去的几十年中，这些方法将其操作限制为用于组间推理的特征提取和线性分类任务。在这种情况下，通过随机排列图像标签或使用考虑受试者之间变异性的随机效应模型来评估统计推断。这些基于 MLE 的多元统计流程虽然比假设驱动的方法更有效地检测激活，但已经失去了数学优雅性、易于解释性以及普遍存在的通用线性模型 (GLM) 的空间定位。最近，当设计矩阵表示为二元指示矩阵时，传统 GLM 的估计已被证明可以与单变量分类任务相关联。在本文中，我们探讨了单变量 GLM 和 MLE \emph{回归} 之间的完整联系。为此，我们基于 \emph{逆} 问题 (SVR-iGLM) 中的线性支持向量回归 (SVR) 获得的参数，使用 GLM 导出了精确的统计测试。随后，采用随机场理论 (RFT) 来评估遵循传统 GLM 基准的统计显着性。实验结果证明了从每个模型（主要是 GLM 和 SVR）导出的参数估计如何产生与预定义功能任务显着相关的不同实验设计估计。此外，使用来自多站点计划的真实数据，所提出的基于 MLE 的推理展示了统计能力和误报控制，优于常规 GLM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机器学习的假设驱动方法，用于神经影像数据的分析，结合广义线性模型（GLM）与支持向量回归（SVR）以提升统计推断效果。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法在神经影像分析中存在可解释性差、空间定位不足的问题，而GLM虽具数学简洁性但统计效能有限，需探索两者的融合以兼顾效能与可解释性。
AI.method: 通过逆问题支持向量回归（SVR-iGLM）建立GLM与机器学习回归的联系，结合随机域理论（RFT）进行统计显著性检验，并基于多中心真实数据验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在统计效能与假阳性控制上优于传统GLM，且参数估计与预设功能任务显著相关，验证了其在实际数据中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的机器学习驱动的统计推断框架有效结合了GLM的可解释性与ML的检测能力，在神经影像分析中展现出更高的统计效能与可靠性。

In the last few decades, these approaches have limited their operation to feature extraction and linear classification tasks for between-group inference. In this context, statistical inference is assessed by randomly permuting image labels or by the use of random effect models that consider between-subject variability. authors_text: Jens Ahrens
title: Binaural Audio Rendering in the Spherical Harmonic Domain: A Summary of the Mathematics and its Pitfalls
title_zh: 球谐域中的双耳音频渲染：数学及其陷阱的总结
abstract: The present document reviews the mathematics behind binaural rendering of sound fields that are available as spherical harmonic expansion coefficients. This process is also known as binaural ambisonic decoding. We highlight that the details entail some amount peculiarity so that one has to be well aware of the precise definitions that are chosen for some of the involved quantities to obtain a consistent formulation. We also discuss what sets of definitions produce ambisonic signals that are compatible with the most common software tools that are available.
summary: The present document reviews the mathematics behind binaural rendering of sound fields that are available as spherical harmonic expansion coefficients. This process is also known as binaural ambisonic decoding. We highlight that the details entail some amount peculiarity so that one has to be well aware of the precise definitions that are chosen for some of the involved quantities to obtain a consistent formulation. We also discuss what sets of definitions produce ambisonic signals that are compatible with the most common software tools that are available.
abstract_zh: 本文档回顾了可用作球谐展开系数的声场双耳渲染背后的数学原理。此过程也称为双耳环绕声解码。我们强调，细节需要一定的数量特殊性，因此必须充分了解为某些涉及的数量选择的精确定义，以获得一致的公式。我们还讨论了哪些定义集产生与最常见的可用软件工具兼容的立体混响信号。

AI.tldr: 总结双耳音频渲染在球面谐波域中的数学方法及其潜在问题
AI.motivation: 明确双耳渲染中关键量的定义以确保数学一致性，并确保与常用软件工具兼容
AI.method: 通过回顾球面谐波展开系数的双耳渲染数学方法，并分析不同定义对结果的影响
AI.result: 明确了不同定义对双耳渲染结果的影响，并识别了与主流软件兼容的定义集
AI.conclusion: 正确选择数学定义是实现双耳渲染技术一致性和兼容性的关键

authors_text: Duo Wang,Yiren Zhao,Ilia Shumailov,Robert Mullins
title: Model Architecture Adaption for Bayesian Neural Networks
title_zh: 贝叶斯神经网络的模型架构适应
abstract: Bayesian Neural Networks (BNNs) offer a mathematically grounded framework to quantify the uncertainty of model predictions but come with a prohibitive computation cost for both training and inference. In this work, we show a novel network architecture search (NAS) that optimizes BNNs for both accuracy and uncertainty while having a reduced inference latency. Different from canonical NAS that optimizes solely for in-distribution likelihood, the proposed scheme searches for the uncertainty performance using both in- and out-of-distribution data. Our method is able to search for the correct placement of Bayesian layer(s) in a network. In our experiments, the searched models show comparable uncertainty quantification ability and accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art (deep ensemble). In addition, the searched models use only a fraction of the runtime compared to many popular BNN baselines, reducing the inference runtime cost by $2.98 \times$ and $2.92 \times$ respectively on the CIFAR10 dataset when compared to MCDropout and deep ensemble.
summary: Bayesian Neural Networks (BNNs) offer a mathematically grounded framework to quantify the uncertainty of model predictions but come with a prohibitive computation cost for both training and inference. In this work, we show a novel network architecture search (NAS) that optimizes BNNs for both accuracy and uncertainty while having a reduced inference latency. Different from canonical NAS that optimizes solely for in-distribution likelihood, the proposed scheme searches for the uncertainty performance using both in- and out-of-distribution data. Our method is able to search for the correct placement of Bayesian layer(s) in a network. In our experiments, the searched models show comparable uncertainty quantification ability and accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art (deep ensemble). In addition, the searched models use only a fraction of the runtime compared to many popular BNN baselines, reducing the inference runtime cost by $2.98 \times$ and $2.92 \times$ respectively on the CIFAR10 dataset when compared to MCDropout and deep ensemble.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN) 提供了一个以数学为基础的框架来量化模型预测的不确定性，但训练和推理的计算成本却过高。在这项工作中，我们展示了一种新颖的网络架构搜索 (NAS)，它可以优化 BNN 的准确性和不确定性，同时减少推理延迟。与仅针对分布内可能性进行优化的规范 NAS 不同，所提出的方案使用分布内和分布外数据来搜索不确定性性能。我们的方法能够搜索网络中贝叶斯层的正确位置。在我们的实验中，与最先进的（深度集成）相比，搜索到的模型显示出可比的不确定性量化能力和准确性。此外，与许多流行的 BNN 基线相比，搜索模型仅使用运行时间的一小部分，与 MCDropout 和深度集成相比，CIFAR10 数据集上的推理运行时间成本分别降低了 2.98 美元和 2.92 美元。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种针对贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）的模型架构自适应方法，通过网络架构搜索（NAS）在保证准确性和不确定性量化能力的同时降低推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯神经网络虽能量化预测不确定性，但训练和推理计算成本高。传统NAS方法仅优化分布内数据性能，无法有效平衡不确定性与效率。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型NAS框架，利用分布内和分布外数据联合优化不确定性性能，自动搜索贝叶斯层的最佳部署位置。
AI.result: 实验表明，所搜模型在CIFAR10数据集上相比MCDropout和深度集成方法，推理时间分别减少2.98倍和2.92倍，同时保持相当的准确性和不确定性量化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合优化架构设计，有效解决了BNN计算效率与不确定性性能的矛盾，为实际应用提供了更高效的解决方案。
