result: 在合成与真实噪声数据集上均优于基线方法，适用于分类与分割任务，且对噪声标签的鲁棒性显著提升。
conclusion: L2B为噪声标签问题提供了高效通用的解决方案，可作为现有方法的有效补充，具有广泛的实践价值。
search_text: L2B: Learning to Bootstrap Robust Models for Combating Label Noise L2B：学习引导鲁棒模型来对抗标签噪声 Deep neural networks have shown great success in representation learning. However, when learning with noisy labels (LNL), they can easily overfit and fail to generalize to new data. This paper introduces a simple and effective method, named Learning to Bootstrap (L2B), which enables models to bootstrap themselves using their own predictions without being adversely affected by erroneous pseudo-labels. It achieves this by dynamically adjusting the importance weight between real observed and generated labels, as well as between different samples through meta-learning. Unlike existing instance reweighting methods, the key to our method lies in a new, versatile objective that enables implicit relabeling concurrently, leading to significant improvements without incurring additional costs. L2B offers several benefits over the baseline methods. It yields more robust models that are less susceptible to the impact of noisy labels by guiding the bootstrapping procedure more effectively. It better exploits the valuable information contained in corrupted instances by adapting the weights of both instances and labels. Furthermore, L2B is compatible with existing LNL methods and delivers competitive results spanning natural and medical imaging tasks including classification and segmentation under both synthetic and real-world noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method effectively mitigates the challenges of noisy labels, often necessitating few to no validation samples, and is well generalized to other tasks such as image segmentation. This not only positions it as a robust complement to existing LNL techniques but also underscores its practical applicability. The code and models are available at https://github.com/yuyinzhou/l2b. 深度神经网络在表示学习方面取得了巨大的成功。然而，当使用噪声标签（LNL）学习时，它们很容易过度拟合并且无法泛化到新数据。本文介绍了一种简单有效的方法，名为“Learning to Bootstrap”（L2B），该方法使模型能够使用自己的预测进行自我引导，而不会受到错误伪标签的不利影响。它通过动态调整真实观察到的标签和生成的标签之间以及通过元学习不同样本之间的重要性权重来实现这一点。与现有的实例重新加权方法不同，我们方法的关键在于一个新的、多功能的目标，它可以同时实现隐式重新标记，从而在不产生额外成本的情况下实现显着改进。与基线方法相比，L2B 具有多种优势。它通过更有效地指导引导过程，产生更稳健的模型，不易受到噪声标签的影响。通过调整实例和标签的权重，它可以更好地利用损坏实例中包含的有价值的信息。此外，L2B 与现有的 LNL 方法兼容，并在自然和医学成像任务中提供具有竞争力的结果，包括在合成和现实噪声下的分类和分割。大量的实验表明，我们的方法有效地减轻了噪声标签的挑战，通常需要很少甚至不需要验证样本，并且可以很好地推广到图像分割等其他任务。这不仅使其成为现有 LNL 技术的有力补充，而且还强调了其实际适用性。代码和模型可在https://github.com/yuyin Zhou/l2b获取。 本文提出L2B方法，通过自引导学习机制动态调整标签权重，以提升模型在存在噪声标签情况下的鲁棒性。 Yuyin Zhou,Xianhang Li,Fengze Liu,Qingyue Wei,Xuxi Chen,Lequan Yu,Cihang Xie,Matthew P. Lungren,Lei Xing cs.CV

authors_text: Jogendra Nath Kundu,Akshay Kulkarni,Suvaansh Bhambri,Varun Jampani,R. Venkatesh Babu
title: Amplitude Spectrum Transformation for Open Compound Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 开放复合域自适应语义分割的幅度谱变换
abstract: Open compound domain adaptation (OCDA) has emerged as a practical adaptation setting which considers a single labeled source domain against a compound of multi-modal unlabeled target data in order to generalize better on novel unseen domains. We hypothesize that an improved disentanglement of domain-related and task-related factors of dense intermediate layer features can greatly aid OCDA. Prior-arts attempt this indirectly by employing adversarial domain discriminators on the spatial CNN output. However, we find that latent features derived from the Fourier-based amplitude spectrum of deep CNN features hold a more tractable mapping with domain discrimination. Motivated by this, we propose a novel feature space Amplitude Spectrum Transformation (AST). During adaptation, we employ the AST auto-encoder for two purposes. First, carefully mined source-target instance pairs undergo a simulation of cross-domain feature stylization (AST-Sim) at a particular layer by altering the AST-latent. Second, AST operating at a later layer is tasked to normalize (AST-Norm) the domain content by fixing its latent to a mean prototype. Our simplified adaptation technique is not only clustering-free but also free from complex adversarial alignment. We achieve leading performance against the prior arts on the OCDA scene segmentation benchmarks.
summary: Open compound domain adaptation (OCDA) has emerged as a practical adaptation setting which considers a single labeled source domain against a compound of multi-modal unlabeled target data in order to generalize better on novel unseen domains. We hypothesize that an improved disentanglement of domain-related and task-related factors of dense intermediate layer features can greatly aid OCDA. Prior-arts attempt this indirectly by employing adversarial domain discriminators on the spatial CNN output. However, we find that latent features derived from the Fourier-based amplitude spectrum of deep CNN features hold a more tractable mapping with domain discrimination. Motivated by this, we propose a novel feature space Amplitude Spectrum Transformation (AST). During adaptation, we employ the AST auto-encoder for two purposes. First, carefully mined source-target instance pairs undergo a simulation of cross-domain feature stylization (AST-Sim) at a particular layer by altering the AST-latent. Second, AST operating at a later layer is tasked to normalize (AST-Norm) the domain content by fixing its latent to a mean prototype. Our simplified adaptation technique is not only clustering-free but also free from complex adversarial alignment. We achieve leading performance against the prior arts on the OCDA scene segmentation benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 开放复合域适应（OCDA）已成为一种实用的适应设置，它考虑单个标记源域与多模态未标记目标数据的复合，以便更好地概括新的未见域。我们假设密集中间层特征的领域相关和任务相关因素的改进解缠可以极大地帮助 OCDA。现有技术通过在空间 CNN 输出上采用对抗域鉴别器来间接尝试这一点。然而，我们发现从深度 CNN 特征的基于傅里叶的幅度谱导出的潜在特征具有更易于处理的域辨别映射。受此启发，我们提出了一种新颖的特征空间幅度谱变换（AST）。在适应过程中，我们使用 AST 自动编码器有两个目的。首先，仔细挖掘的源-目标实例对通过改变 AST-latent 在特定层进行跨域特征风格化 (AST-Sim) 的模拟。其次，在后面一层运行的 AST 的任务是通过将其潜在值固定为平均原型来规范化（AST-Norm）域内容。我们的简化适应技术不仅无需聚类，而且无需复杂的对抗性对齐。我们在 OCDA 场景分割基准上取得了领先于现有技术的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于幅度谱变换（AST）的开放复合领域自适应语义分割方法，通过改进特征空间中的领域与任务因素解耦以提升模型在新型未见领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过对抗域判别器间接处理领域适应问题，但发现基于傅里叶幅度谱的潜在特征能更有效地映射领域判别信息，从而提出更直接的特征空间变换方法。
AI.method: 设计AST自编码器实现双重目标：1）通过修改幅度谱潜在表示进行跨领域特征风格化（AST-Sim）；2）在后期层通过固定均值原型实现领域内容归一化（AST-Norm）。
AI.result: 在开放复合领域自适应场景分割基准测试中，该方法相较现有技术取得领先性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需聚类且摆脱复杂对抗对齐，为开放复合领域自适应提供了更简洁有效的解决方案。
